prompt: In this mixed late-street spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Fold when price and hand strength do not support calling.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the track cue set, so the line avoids paying off when the pressure story is working against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is right here because the mixed late-street line has lost the price and hand-quality support needed to continue.
